source_sql: SELECT IFNULL(name,'匿名') FROM users WHERE deleted=0
gold_target_sql: SELECT COALESCE(name,'匿名') FROM users WHERE deleted=0

source_sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m') AS m FROM orders
gold_target_sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(created_at,'YYYY-MM') AS m FROM orders
gold_report_points: DATE_FORMAT 在 openGauss 不存在，转 TO_CHAR

source_sql: SELECT id FROM logs ORDER BY id LIMIT 20,10
gold_target_sql: SELECT id FROM logs ORDER BY id LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20
gold_report_points: MySQL LIMIT offset,count 改为 LIMIT count OFFSET offset

source_sql: CREATE TABLE t(id INT(11) AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, amt DECIMAL(20,4))
gold_target_sql: CREATE TABLE t(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, amt NUMERIC(20,4))

source_sql: SELECT dept, GROUP_CONCAT(name SEPARATOR ',') FROM emp GROUP BY dept
gold_target_sql: SELECT dept, STRING_AGG(name, ',') FROM emp GROUP BY dept

source_sql: INSERT INTO kv(k,v) VALUES('a',1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE v=v+1
gold_target_sql: INSERT INTO kv(k,v) VALUES('a',1) ON CONFLICT (k) DO UPDATE SET v=kv.v+1
gold_report_points: ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE → ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE
需显式指定冲突列 k
